verse.name: V1
verse.lines: This world, it never gets no better, Seems like I've been here forever; Everything after'while Just seems the same, So it's time to be up in glory I can feel there's a wind there blowing, I'm ready to move, I'm ready to change.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I'm ready to move, move on up to another dimension, I'm ready to change, relocate to another location; There's nothing to hold me here no more, I'm already out the door; I've got the Holy Ghost here to prove I'm ready to move.

verse.name: V3
